top_signals.title: EU Risks Losing More Than 1 Million Jobs Over Global Pressures
top_signals.summary: The European Union is at risk of losing more than 1 million jobs this year over the Iran war’s economic fallout and rising global competition, the bloc’s executive warned.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Said to Ready Tax Cut Plans to Attract Foreign Bond Buyers
top_signals.summary: India is poised to announce steps to draw more foreign investments by reducing taxes and removing caps on the ownership of some bonds as soon as this week, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google adds Android protection against AI deepfake scam calls
top_signals.summary: Google is introducing a new Android security feature that will detect and flag phone calls in which scammers use artificial intelligence to impersonate a user's personal contacts. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Everest Funeral Concierge Partners With WTW
top_signals.summary: WTW will introduce Everest’s unique funeral planning and advocacy support to UK clients’ employees, expanding employer wellbeing
